AccelKey

Keyboard-accelerator chord: invoked from anywhere once focused routing leaves the key unhandled. 0 = none.

public int AccelKey

int

AccessKey

Access-key mnemonic (Alt+letter; uppercase VK 'A'..'Z' / '0'..'9'). 0 = none.

Cursor

Meaningful only while CursorBit is set (an element-declared cursor); without the bit the dispatcher's hover walk skips this node and falls through to the system arrow — there is no clickable⇒hand default.

public CursorId Cursor

Field Value

CursorId

FocusVisualMargin

WinUI FocusVisualMargin (negative = the focus ring expands OUTSIDE the bounds; WinUI templates use −3, Slider −7,0,−7,0). Written resolved by the reconciler (default −3 all around).

RepeatDelayMs

WinUI RepeatButton Delay/Interval (ms) for RepeatBit nodes. NaN (or non-positive) = the WinUI DP defaults (500/33, DependencyProperty.cpp:714-720); ScrollBar template arrows use Interval=50.

public float RepeatDelayMs

Field Value

float

RepeatIntervalMs

WinUI RepeatButton Delay/Interval (ms) for RepeatBit nodes. NaN (or non-positive) = the WinUI DP defaults (500/33, DependencyProperty.cpp:714-720); ScrollBar template arrows use Interval=50.

public float RepeatIntervalMs

float

FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
